creator: herminio.hernandezjr@gmail.com
text:
I am failing to install the texlive-base port on PowerPC. When I run "sudo make install clean" I keep getting this

configure: error: Sorry, can not preprocess <lj_arch.h>
=== configuring in luajit failed
gmake[3]: *** [recurse] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/print/texlive-base/work/texlive-20140525-source/libs'
gmake[2]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/print/texlive-base/work/texlive-20140525-source/libs'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/print/texlive-base/work/texlive-20140525-source'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/print/texlive-base
